name_en: Includes full original retail packaging 💖 [New] MIU vintage underarm dumpling bag, new vintage-soft calfskin full of retro nostalgia, paired with steel aged metal hardware. High-quality and elegant, drawstring closure design, fine ruffled edges that are 3D and playful, sophisticated yet lazy and casual. Lined with new striped canvas, with a zippered compartment. Unique design looks good on everyone.
